metadata.name: Set Up New Tenant in Online Portal

description: A new tenant has signed a lease. The PM needs to set them up with an account for the online tenant portal to pay rent and submit maintenance requests.

nodes.task_description: Create a new user account in the tenant portal using the tenant's information.

expected_outcome.value: A new portal account is created for the tenant.

nodes.task_description: Link the user account to the correct property unit and lease agreement.

expected_outcome.value: The portal account is correctly associated with the tenant's specific unit and financial ledger.

nodes.task_description: Send a welcome email to the tenant with a link to activate their portal account and set a password.

expected_outcome.value: An automated welcome and activation email is sent to the new tenant.
